_doc: Real-model config for the arch-drift example. Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 via the claude_cli backend. Requires `claude` on PATH (https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code) and the mermaid renderer `mmdc` on PATH (`npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli`). See arch-drift.local.json for the offline / fake run.
